subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous royal city was founded by Rana Kumbha?

question_hi.explanation_en:
After the death of Rana Kumbha, Rajasthan was divided into four mahajans.
1. Mewar State (मीया सेल)
2. Aravalli State (अवली सेल)
3. Marwar State (मर्वार सेल)
4. Jaisamand State (जयसमंद सेल)
